infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Miraj uses your location to calculate accurate prayer times and qibla direction.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Miraj uses your location in the background to detect when you are at a mosque so it can adjust alarms and reminders.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Miraj uses the compass and motion sensors to show an accurate qibla direction.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Miraj uses the camera so you can scan your prayer mat, sink, or the mosque to confirm you are ready for salah.
infoPlist.NSAlarmKitUsageDescription: Miraj schedules prominent alarms at prayer times so you never miss a salah.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Miraj uses your location to detect when you are at a mosque and to keep prayer times accurate.

plugins.cameraPermission: Miraj uses the camera so you can scan your prayer mat, sink, or the mosque to confirm you are ready for salah.
